g_MgMg_pair_correlation.comment: g_MgMg(r) for GB-Mg atoms, divided by g_MgMg(r) of a random uniform placement on GB sites at the same N_Mg^GB count. Ratio < 1 at small r = Mg avoid each other (repulsive); > 1 = clustering. Range over which ratio deviates from 1 = interaction length scale.

site_occupation_vs_energy.comment: Empirical P_i (binary, type==2 in snapshot) averaged within ΔE bins, vs Wagih FD curve P_i^Wagih(ΔE_i; T, X_c). Systematic gap below the Wagih curve at favourable (negative) ΔE_i = strong-binding sites are occupied less than independent-site theory predicts.

site_occupation_vs_density.comment: P_i restricted to favourable-ΔE window (-30.0, -5.0) kJ/mol (218/500 sites), binned by per-site n_Mg^local(r=5Å). Slope < 0 = more neighbour Mg → lower occupation = direct site-level repulsion.
